PilotPage.title: OpenCouncil is running a pilot with some of the latest city council meetings of the Municipality of Athens.
PilotPage.subtitle: The information contained may have errors.

Footer.disclaimer: The information shown is automatically collected and may not be accurate.

CityForm.cityNameDescription: Enter the name of the city.
CityForm.timezoneDescription: Choose the time zone of the city.
CityForm.cityIdDescription: The ID will be used in the city's URL.
CityForm.logoImageDescription: The image you choose will be used as the city's logo.
CityForm.cityNameEnDescription: Enter the name of the city in English.
CityForm.cityMunicipalityDescription: Enter the name of the municipality.
CityForm.cityMunicipalityEnDescription: Enter the name of the municipality in English.
CityForm.officialSupportDescription: Cities with official support are prioritized in listings and appear on the landing page with meeting data. They also display a special badge.
CityForm.statusDescription: Pending cities route to petition page and are excluded from public listings. Unlisted cities are only visible to administrators. Listed cities are publicly visible.
CityForm.peopleOrderingDescription: Choose how people are ordered on the people page. Party Ranking orders by party power and custom party rankings.
CityForm.highlightCreationPermissionDescription: Control who can create highlights for this city
CityForm.supportsNotificationsDescription: Enable email and SMS notifications for meetings in this city
CityForm.consultationsEnabledDescription: Enable the public consultations tab for this city
CityForm.diavgeiaUidDescription: The organization UID on Diavgeia (diavgeia.gov.gr). Required for automatic decision polling.

CityMessageForm.noMessageSet: No message currently set for this city.
CityMessageForm.title: Title
CityMessageForm.inactiveDescription: Inactive messages are only visible to superadmins for preview purposes.

City.councilMeetingsTracked: {count, plural, =0 {No council meetings on OpenCouncil} =1 {1 council meeting on OpenCouncil} other {# council meetings on OpenCouncil}}
City.noItems: There are no cities in OpenCouncil.

EmbedConfigurator.title: Widget for your website
EmbedConfigurator.description: Embed council meetings on your municipality website. Customize the appearance, copy the iframe code and paste it into your CMS (WordPress, Joomla, etc.).
EmbedConfigurator.accentColorHint: The main widget color — used for titles, links and badges. Match it to your site's brand color.
EmbedConfigurator.embedCodeHint: Copy and paste into an HTML block on your site.
EmbedConfigurator.troubleshootingCSP: If the widget doesn't load, check that your site's Content Security Policy (CSP) allows frame-src from opencouncil.gr.
EmbedConfigurator.troubleshootingWordPress: In WordPress, use a Custom HTML block. In Joomla, use a "Custom / mod_custom" module with the editor in code view.
EmbedConfigurator.troubleshootingHeight: Adjust the height value in the code based on the number of meetings. For 5 meetings, 600px is a good starting point.

AddMeetingForm.meetingNameDescription: Provide a name for the council meeting.
AddMeetingForm.meetingDateDescription: Select the date when the meeting took place.
AddMeetingForm.meetingTimeDescription: Select the time when the meeting took place.
AddMeetingForm.meetingVideoDescription: Choose the video recording for this meeting.
AddMeetingForm.meetingIdDescription: The ID will be used in the meeting's URL.
AddMeetingForm.meetingNameEnPlaceholder: Enter the meeting name in English
AddMeetingForm.meetingNameEnDescription: Provide the meeting name in English.
AddMeetingForm.administrativeBodyDescription: Select the administrative body for this meeting.
AddMeetingForm.meetingAgendaDescription: Provide a URL or upload a file with the meeting agenda.
AddMeetingForm.processAgendaDescription: Automatically parse the agenda into structured items after creation.

NotFoundPage.title: Page Not Found
NotFoundPage.description: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
NotFoundPage.suggestion: Please check the URL or return to the home page.
NotFoundPage.helpDescription: If you believe this is an error, you can contact us.

hero.title: Bringing citizens closer to local government
hero.subtitle: OpenCouncil makes city council work visible and accessible to everyone

speakerRecognition.title: Speaker Recognition
speakerRecognition.description: Accurate identification and attribution of speakers in council meetings.

accurateTranscriptions.title: Accurate Transcriptions
accurateTranscriptions.description: Generate accurate, word-for-word transcriptions of all council proceedings.

summarization.title: Summarization
summarization.description: Automatically generate concise summaries of council meetings.

aiChatAssistant.title: AI Chat Assistant
aiChatAssistant.description: Ask questions about council meetings and get answers from the AI chat assistant.

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.description: Watch the most important parts of each meeting, with highlights generated by AI or manually.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Transparent development, continuous improvement. Flexible license allowing commercial use.

openData.title: Open Data
openData.description: All data we generate is public and available via an open API without authentication.

multilingual.title: Multilingual
multilingual.description: Support for multiple languages to serve multicultural cities. All meetings are transcribed in English and Greek.

immediateIntegration.title: Immediate Integration
immediateIntegration.description: Connect OpenCouncil to your municipality in hours, not months.

enhancedAccessibility.title: Enhanced Accessibility
enhancedAccessibility.description: Make city council meetings understandable and accessible to all citizens, including people with disabilities. Our platform ensures local democracy is inclusive, transparent, and accessible to every member of the community.

empowerCouncilMembers.title: Empower Council Members
empowerCouncilMembers.description: Equip your council members with powerful tools to optimize their work. Advanced search and organization features allow quick access to previous discussions, decisions, and important information, enhancing productivity and informed decision-making.

buildValuableAsset.title: Build a Valuable Asset
buildValuableAsset.description: Create a rich, searchable database of council proceedings. This open data asset not only promotes transparency but also provides invaluable insights for policy-making, research, and citizen engagement, positioning your city at the forefront of smart governance.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.description: We believe in transparent pricing, especially when serving the public sector.

paid.title: €7,800 per year
paid.subtitle: (Or one ten-thousandth of the municipality's budget, whichever is less)

features.unlimitedMeetings: Unlimited city council meetings per year
features.aiChatCredits: €100 in AI chat credits per month

about.title: About OpenCouncil
about.description: OpenCouncil is a one-person project created in Greece 🇬🇷, built with care and respect for local government.

editMode.label: Edit Mode
editMode.description: Enable edit mode for transcript text

highlightUncertain.label: Highlight Uncertain Words
highlightUncertain.description: Highlight words with low recognition confidence

maxUtteranceDrift.label: Maximum Utterance Drift
maxUtteranceDrift.description: Maximum allowed time drift for each utterance in seconds

errors.emailExists: The email {email} is already in use. Please use a different email or sign in.
errors.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.loadingError: An error occurred while loading preferences. Please try again.

PersonForm.imageDescription: Upload an image for the member.

Unsubscribe.invalidLinkDescription: This unsubscribe link is not valid or has expired.
Unsubscribe.successCityDescription: You will no longer receive notifications for {cityName}.
Unsubscribe.successAllDescription: You have been unsubscribed from all OpenCouncil updates.
Unsubscribe.errorDescription: We could not process your unsubscribe request. Please try again or contact us.
Unsubscribe.heading: Unsubscribe from notifications
Unsubscribe.accountLabel: You are signed in with account:
Unsubscribe.description: By unsubscribing from notifications, you will stop receiving notifications for this municipality. If you unsubscribe from all communications, you will stop receiving any notification or update from OpenCouncil.
Unsubscribe.preferencesSectionDescription: Select what you'd like to receive from OpenCouncil.
Unsubscribe.cityCheckboxDescription: Updates about this municipality's council meetings.
Unsubscribe.cityAlreadyUnsubscribed: You are not subscribed to notifications for this municipality. You can re-subscribe from your profile.
Unsubscribe.successPreferencesDescription: Your communication preferences have been updated.
Unsubscribe.allSectionDescription: This unsubscribes you from notifications for every city, and turns off product updates and petition updates.
Unsubscribe.unsubscribeCityButton: Unsubscribe from notifications for this municipality
Unsubscribe.unsubscribeAllCheckboxDescription: Turns off notifications for every city and both product and petition updates.

NotificationPreferences.noPreferencesDescription: You have not enabled notifications for any city. Sign up to receive updates about municipal council topics that matter to you.
NotificationPreferences.noNotifications: You have not received any notifications yet.
NotificationPreferences.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete notifications for {cityName}?

Profile.onboardingDescription: Please fill in the following information to complete your registration.
Profile.emailChangeTooltip: To change your email, contact us at dpo@opencouncil.gr
Profile.allowProductUpdatesDescription: I allow OpenCouncil to contact me for important updates and announcements.
Profile.allowPetitionUpdatesDescription: I allow OpenCouncil to notify me about the progress of petitions I submitted to support new municipalities.
Profile.title: Profile
Profile.yourDataDescription: You have the right to request a copy of all personal data we hold about you. To do so, send us an email at
Profile.deleteAccountDescription: You can permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
Profile.deleteAccountConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete your account and all your data, including notification preferences and history. This action cannot be undone.
Profile.deleteAccountError: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us.
Profile.noAdminAccess: You do not have administration rights.
Profile.contactForAccess: To gain administration access, contact us:

OfferForm.ingestionPerHourPriceDescription: The ingestion price per hour in euros

OfferForm.correctnessGuaranteeDescription: Human review of transcripts to confirm accuracy

PartyMemberRankingSheet.title: Change Member Ordering
PartyMemberRankingSheet.description: Drag and drop members to reorder them. The order will be saved as rankings.
PartyMemberRankingSheet.rankingsSavedDescription: Member rankings have been updated successfully.
PartyMemberRankingSheet.rankingsResetDescription: All member rankings have been reset.
PartyMemberRankingSheet.saveError: Failed to save rankings. Please try again.
PartyMemberRankingSheet.resetError: Failed to reset rankings. Please try again.

ElectedOrderSheet.title: Elected Order
ElectedOrderSheet.description: Drag and drop members to set the council election order. This order is used in official meeting minutes.
ElectedOrderSheet.orderSavedDescription: The elected order has been updated successfully.
ElectedOrderSheet.orderResetDescription: All elected order values have been reset.
ElectedOrderSheet.saveError: Failed to save elected order. Please try again.
ElectedOrderSheet.resetError: Failed to reset elected order. Please try again.
ElectedOrderSheet.backupHint: Save or restore this order as a file.
ElectedOrderSheet.importSuccessDescription: Matched {count} of {total} members. Review the order and click Save to persist.
ElectedOrderSheet.importErrorDescription: Could not parse the selected file. Please select a valid elected order JSON file.

Subject.notificationImportanceDescription: This information determines which users will be notified about this subject based on their preferences.
